subcodes.first_line: The atoms have spoken even as the Revealer of Verses spoke when He came with clear proofs which none could match [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نطقت الذرات بما نطق منزل الآیات اذ اتی بالبیّنات التی عجز عن الاتیان
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @power of prayer, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity
